name: Impossible Macaroni & Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
Approx. Cook Time: 40 minutes
Preheat oven to 400°F. Grease a pie plate measuring 10 x 1 1/2 inches. Mix together the two cups of Cheddar cheese and Macaroni in the plate. Beat the remaining ingredients (except for 1/4 cup cheese) in a blender until smooth, about 15 seconds. Pour the mixture into the plate. Bake until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean, approximately 40 minutes. Sprinkle with 1/4 cup Cheddar cheese and bake until the cheese melts, for an additional 1-2 minutes. Allow to cool for 10 minutes.
